channel.title: NEXUS Notifications
channel.description: Site updates and important notifications for NEXUS users

item.title: NEXUS v1.5 Update
item.description:
We just rolled out highly requested mobile UI improvements!
- Implemented standard mobile PWA edge-to-edge support with notch layout optimization. - Added native "Install NEXUS App" prompt within the sidebar Discover menu. - Fixed Sidebar navigation to instantly match desktop parity. - New Player Lock UI specifically tuned for Mobile with intuitive 3-second auto-hide mechanisms.
Enjoy the new mobile experience!

item.title: NEXUS Quality of Life Patches
item.description: Smooth functionality patches are now live! We've focused heavily on player logic to ensure that video playbacks pause and unpause responsively across all desktop browsers. Additional backend infrastructure optimizations have also been pushed!

item.title: Welcome to NEXUS!
item.description: NEXUS is now officially live! Experience the next generation of streaming. Unlimited movies, TV shows, and anime in stunning quality. No ads, no sign-up, just pure entertainment. Stream effortlessly.
